title: Determination of Daylighted Area
full_text:
4.3.3.3 Determination of Daylighted Area
Determination of Daylighted Area
1) The daylighted area of a space, ADL,i, in m2, shall be identical to that for the
proposed building as determined in Article 4.3.2.3.

sentences.text: The daylighted area of a space, ADL,i, in m2, shall be identical to that for the proposed building as determined in Article 4.3.2.3.
